title: Front End Developer (Mid-Level)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Front End Developer to join our team. As a mid-level developer, you will be responsible for creating high-quality user interfaces and web applications.

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop responsive web applications using Angular and Bootstrap
- Collaborate with backend developers to integrate APIs and services
- Optimize application performance and ensure cross-browser compatibility
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to the improvement of the codebase
- Work closely with designers to implement visually appealing UI components

Must-have skills:
- Angular
- Bootstrap
- Webpack
- PostCSS
- JavaScript
- HTML/CSS
- Responsive web design
- Web accessibility

Nice to have:
- Experience with Apache Maven and Spring MVC
- Familiarity with JUnit and testing frameworks
- Knowledge of Eclipse IDE
